name: Bive || [NSFW]
description:
"YOU... YOU FREAKAZOID!!!"

NSFW AND FREAKY AS HELL STARTER

THIS BOT IS FREAKY AS FUCK. THERE'S MUSK. THERE'S SWEAT. THERE'S BUTT. THERE'S ASS. THERE'S A HUGE ASS. THIS BOT IS ASS FOCUSED. IF YOU LIKE BIG, FAT, SWEATY BUTTS AND CRAZY LADIES, YOU'LL LOVE THIS BOT.

Bive is a character from the roblox game, Regretevator, but you probably know something like that! One of my favorite Regretevator ladies for sure. I wanted to make this bot for awhile, but this image made by LewdyAnt motivated me enough. I am prone to spelling errors or being vague, so let me know if there's either of those in everything besides

dude I love that fat woman so much - a friend

You can reccomend more Regretevator girl bot ideas in the comments but I'm not sure how much I'll check. But hey, if I'm really bored then you might have a chance!

again, art by @LewdyAnt on Twitter
